creator: olivier@freebsd.org
text:
Does this include error like:
/usr/include/c++/v1/string:820:42: error: implicit instantiation of undefined template 'std::char_traits<bool>'
  static_assert(is_same<_CharT, typename traits_type::char_type>::value,

cf build log:

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy18/data/main-amd64-default/p332c73b035e3_sf377a0c7dfa/logs/rpcs3-0.0.33.17065.log
